category_sources: Official README says ISA-L is optimized low-level functions targeting storage applications.
source_facts.description identifies the Intelligent Storage Acceleration Library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Intel(R) Intelligent Storage Acceleration Library and abbreviation ISA-L.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents features, build information, and links to units/tests/build details.
Official README points to the GitHub wiki as project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/intel/isa-l; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README lists erasure codes, CRC, RAID parity, compression, decompression, and igzip.
source_facts.description identifies a storage acceleration library.
